title: exp_bin: Assertion `0' failed
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (id INT PRIMARY KEY, x INT, y INT, z FLOAT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE u (id INT PRIMARY KEY, a INT, b INT, c FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
INSERT INTO u (id, a, b) VALUES (1, 2, 4), (2, 6, 8);
SELECT * FROM t t1 JOIN u u1 ON POWER((t1.x - u1.a), 2) < POWER((t1.y - u1.b), 2);
key_bug_features: select with power function on table self-join
